n: Colours of Infinity: The White Queen
sum: BG2 quest mod with an arctic-themed quest chain involving the White Queen. New areas and encounters in a frozen setting. Part of the Colours of Infinity series.
no: BG2 quest mod with an arctic-themed quest chain involving the White Queen. New areas and encounters in a frozen setting. Part of the Colours of Infinity series.

co.no: New game required. Recommended for fresh EET installs
